sections.paragraph:
- Original: λαός

- Transliteration: Laos

- Phonetic: lah-os'

- Definition:

1. a people, people group, tribe, nation, all those who are of the same stock and language

2. of a great part of the population gathered together anywhere

- Origin: apparently a primary word

- TDNT entry: 04:29,5

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Apparently a primary word; a people (in general; thus differing from G1218 which denotes one´ s own populace): - people.
